pairs.question: What is the title of the second episode in the seventh season of Family Guy?
pairs.answer: The title of the second episode in the seventh season of Family Guy is 'I Dream of Jesus'.

pairs.question: When did the episode 'I Dream of Jesus' originally air on Fox?
pairs.answer: The episode 'I Dream of Jesus' originally aired on Fox in the United States on October 5, 2008.

pairs.question: Which song is prominently featured in the Family Guy episode 'I Dream of Jesus'?
pairs.answer: The song prominently featured in the episode is 'Surfin' Bird' by the Trashmen.

pairs.question: Who voiced Jesus Christ in the episode 'I Dream of Jesus'?
pairs.answer: Jesus Christ was voiced by Alec Sulkin in the episode.

pairs.question: What real-world television series is the title of 'I Dream of Jesus' a reference to?
pairs.answer: The title 'I Dream of Jesus' is a reference to the television series 'I Dream of Jeannie'.

pairs.question: How many viewers watched the episode 'I Dream of Jesus' when it first aired?
pairs.answer: According to Nielsen Media Research, 'I Dream of Jesus' was watched by 8.4 million viewers when it first aired.

pairs.question: Which awards was Seth MacFarlane nominated for due to his role in 'I Dream of Jesus'?
pairs.answer: Seth MacFarlane was nominated for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Voice-Over Performance and the Annie Award for his role as Peter Griffin in this episode.
